queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of lacking a primary checking account to credit risk drivers and determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of minimal savings account balances on credit risk drivers and determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Installment rate as a percentage of disposable income.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the role of installment commitment as a percentage of disposable income in reducing credit risk drivers and determinants of default.
